title: Little Light
lyrics: 2022, I'm out of bangin with me, I know you're beggin for me, yeah, I know you're beggin for me, beggin for me, beggin for me all night, you're beggin for this shit, beggin for me, beggin for me all your life, you've been waitin for this shit No, it gets down, I really hope, yeah, no, you really don't know which way to go, yeah, ayy, too many nights, too many thoughts, too many stars made you go from the heart, get loose, ayy, what you gotta lose Come with me and the angels fly, come with me and the angels fly with you, it's called the light and what we do Know that it's how I don't know, that I can't hit, know that I know, there's no more to you than just a plain stance, can you hear me talkin, cause boy, that's the level it got, better, better than it got, cheddar, cheddar, then you roll, roll with it and you nod like little head, you're gone, what you done, what you get busted and get some, ayy Know that it hurts when the truth hits you right in the eye, in disguise, know that it hurts when the truth hits you right in the eye, in disguise Don't you think you got more to learn, nah, to just burn, don't you think you got more to learn, ayy, to just burn Thinkin' of me, thinkin' product of history, ayy, bring it, bring it in, ayy Everything we taught about a moment from a point is just a fundamental judgment of a judgmental front and seeing our lives at degrees, and these ain't interest degrees of the only thing We talk to each other, compositional lost in battle fought and I can't tell you no more, if you don't have anything left to ignore When our bodies hit the fuckin' floor, when our bodies hit the fuckin' floor Mad scientist, mad scientist of science, of science, of science and what you thinkin' for, why you doubtin' everything, down the ways, I make the freestyle comin' all rage So, light, light, look into me, ayy, the light, light, look into me, little light, little light, come and fuckin' fight, little light, little, little light, come and motherfuckin' fight, ayy Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: 2022, I'm out of bangin with me, I know you're beggin for me, yeah, I know you're beggin for me, beggin for me, beggin for me all night, you're beggin for this shit, beggin for me, beggin for me all your life, you've been waitin for this shit

No, it gets down, I really hope, yeah, no, you really don't know which way to go, yeah, ayy, too many nights, too many thoughts, too many stars made you go from the heart, get loose, ayy, what you gotta lose
Come with me and the angels fly, come with me and the angels fly with you, it's called the light and what we do

Know that it's how I don't know, that I can't hit, know that I know, there's no more to you than just a plain stance, can you hear me talkin, cause boy, that's the level it got, better, better than it got, cheddar, cheddar, then you roll, roll with it and you nod like little head, you're gone, what you done, what you get busted and get some, ayy
Know that it hurts when the truth hits you right in the eye, in disguise, know that it hurts when the truth hits you right in the eye, in disguise
Don't you think you got more to learn, nah, to just burn, don't you think you got more to learn, ayy, to just burn
Thinkin' of me, thinkin' product of history, ayy, bring it, bring it in, ayy
Everything we taught about a moment from a point is just a fundamental judgment of a judgmental front and seeing our lives at degrees, and these ain't interest degrees of the only thing
We talk to each other, compositional lost in battle fought and I can't tell you no more, if you don't have anything left to ignore
When our bodies hit the fuckin' floor, when our bodies hit the fuckin' floor
Mad scientist, mad scientist of science, of science, of science and what you thinkin' for, why you doubtin' everything, down the ways, I make the freestyle comin' all rage
So, light, light, look into me, ayy, the light, light, look into me, little light, little light, come and fuckin' fight, little light, little, little light, come and motherfuckin' fight, ayy
